mapper.select: SELECT approval_request_id, document_type, document_id, request_type, requester_id, approver_id, comment, review_snapshot, requested_at, reviewed_at, status FROM approval_requests WHERE approval_request_id = #{approvalRequestId}
SELECT approval_request_id, document_type, document_id, request_type, requester_id, approver_id, comment, review_snapshot, requested_at, reviewed_at, status FROM approval_requests
